species.citation: (L.) Thulin , Taxon 65 (2016) 784; ≡ Mollugo stricta L. , Sp. Pl., 2nd Ed. (1762) 131. ≠ Mollugo pentaphylla auct. non L. ; Merr., EPFP 2 (1923) 135; Backer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1951) 268.
